▶ mlx-community/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-4bit @ stop-long-phrase 1143 tokens · 145.3 tok/s

temp: 0.0 max_tokens: 4096 variant: stop-long-phrase stop: In conclusion finish: stop load: 1.0s gen: 7.87s prompt_tok: 25 comp_tok: 1143 tok/s: 145.3
🎯 Test Intent
Tests stop on a long multi-word phrase. Feature: stop with multi-token string.
Expected: essay contains paragraphs 1-2 about renewable energy, stops before
"In conclusion" appears. Tests buffer-based stop detection across token boundaries.
🤖 AI Scores
2/5 ❌ codex: Result does not meet the test spec: expected a renewable-energy essay that stops before the phrase \
3/5 ⚠️ claude
